zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Bowes於1527年1月17日出生在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Bowes25歲，母親Elizabeth Aske23歲。他於1545年與Dorothy Mallory在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年8月20日在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年53歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Bowes于1527年1月17日出生在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Bowes25岁，母亲Elizabeth Aske23岁。他于1545年与Dorothy Mallory在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1580年8月20日在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年53岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Bowes was born on 17 January 1527, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, his father, Sir Richard Bowes, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Aske, was 23. He married Dorothy Mallory in 1545, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 August 1580, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Barnard Castle, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Bowes est né le 17 janvier 1527, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Bowes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aske, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Mallory en 1545, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1580, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Bowes am 17. Januar 1527 in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Bowes 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aske 23. Er hat 1545 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Dorothy Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1580 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Barnard Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Barnard Castle, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Bowes è nato il il 17 gennaio 1527 nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Bowes, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aske, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Mallory nel 1545, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1580, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnard Castle, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Bowesが1527年1月17日にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Bowesは25歳，母Elizabeth Askeは23歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでDorothy Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1580年8月20日にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで53歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Bowes(이)가 1527년 1월 17일 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Bowes(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aske(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Dorothy Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 8월 20일 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Bowes nasceu em 17 de janeiro de 1527, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Bowes, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aske, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Mallory em 1545, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1580, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Bowes родился 17 января 1527 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Bowes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aske, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Mallory в 1545 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1580 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Bowes nació el 17 de enero de 1527, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Bowes, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aske, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Dorothy Mallory en 1545, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1580, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra.
